waterings.insight: The command is not 'love your neighbor as a duty' but 'as yourself' — the prerequisite is that you already love yourself rightly. Without self-knowledge and self-acceptance, love of neighbor becomes performance, projection, or resentment wearing a mask. The 'as yourself' is the hinge.

[pollination with seed-20260407-aa44b251] Know thyself is the prerequisite to 'as yourself.' You cannot love your neighbor as yourself if you do not know who that self is. Self-knowledge enables authentic love; without it, love is projection.

[pollination with seed-20260407-cc621ac9] Love your neighbor at the system level: don't just be kind to individuals — build structures that make kindness the default path. Meadows meets Torah. Justice is systemic love.
